text: Strategic developments emerged during the earnings call, with CEO Brian Chesky signaling a significant pivot toward hotel inventory. Chesky stated the company would be 'going significantly more aggressively into hotels,' a comment that initially sent shares down roughly 6% C008. Simultaneously, Airbnb is charting an AI-first path, with Chesky noting that travel planning cannot be done without AI going forward, as the company expands its customer service agent capabilities C010. Operating margin for Q2 2025 stood at 19.77%, while R&D intensity reached 19.70% of revenue, reflecting continued investment in technology infrastructure K003, K005.
